name: Alphawave IP Group PLC
h1: Alphawave IP's GCC footprint in India
lede: Alphawave IP runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Bengaluru, covering engineering & design and R&D, built over four years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Alphawave IP office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Alphawave IP Group PLC GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Alphawave IP runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru), covering engineering & design and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Alphawave IP's India footprint covers Pune and Bengaluru, spanning engineering & design and R&D. The centers deliver IT and R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eighteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Alphawave IP operate in India?
faq.a: Alphawave IP operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Alphawave IP have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Alphawave IP's India GCC footprint spans Pune and Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Alphawave IP run in India?
faq.a: Alphawave IP runs engineering & design and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Alphawave IP's India GCCs?
faq.a: Alphawave IP's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Alphawave IP's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 18 leaders at Alphawave IP's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
